## Properties

| Property  | Attribute | Description                                  | Type                                                           | Default     |
| --------- | --------- | -------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `pill`    | `pill`    | Draws a pill-style badge with rounded edges. | `boolean`                                                      | `false`     |
| `pulse`   | `pulse`   | Makes the badge pulsate to draw attention.   | `boolean`                                                      | `false`     |
| `variant` | `variant` | The badge's theme variant.                   | `"danger" \| "neutral" \| "primary" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `"primary"` |
